exemplar.title: Prompt 9: Are Some Types Of Knowledge Less Open To Interpretation Than Others?

detailedExemplarData.title: Prompt 9: Are Some Types Of Knowledge Less Open To Interpretation Than Others?

strengths: Clear identification of three distinct, authentic real-world objects with specific contexts
Coherent connections to the IA prompt demonstrating awareness of interpretability
Strong personal engagement (e.g., pandemic-linked cookie recipe, personal map) anchoring the exhibition
weaknesses: Analysis remains largely descriptive and lacks depth in TOK terminology (ways of knowing, AOKs)
Justifications sometimes repetitive or imprecise, with occasional unsupported assertions
Inconsistent and minimal citation format weakens evidential support
feedback.calculationMethod: Holistic AI evaluation: The submission clearly meets the criteria for the 7â8 band by identifying three specific objects, providing contextual detail, and drawing generally coherent links to the IA prompt. Personal perspectives (map, poem, recipe) strengthen authenticity. However, the analysis falls short of the 9â10 band: it remains largely descriptive, lacks explicit TOK terminology and precise conceptual depth, and citations are inconsistently formatted. Awarding 8 reflects its solid performance at the top of the mid-high band while acknowledging areas for deeper theoretical engagement and improved referencing.

annotations.comment: The prompt is prominently stated, demonstrating clear focus on the chosen IA question and providing a strong foundation for the exhibition.
The standalone âTheory of Knowledgeâ header is generic. Consider replacing it with an introduction that frames the IA prompt in your own words and outlines your analytical approach.
The opening paragraph broadly states the issue but lacks a defined thesis or key TOK terms. Define âinterpretationâ and situate your argument using ways of knowing or areas of knowledge.
Selecting a personal map of Vitoria-Gasteiz grounds the exhibition in a specific real-world context, fulfilling the criterion for authentic object choice.
The description of map knowledge remains descriptive. Deepen the analysis by linking to shared versus personal knowledge and discuss how map projections or scale affect interpretation.
Citation is presented as a raw URL. Adopt a consistent academic referencing style (MLA, APA, etc.) to strengthen the credibility of your evidence.
The argument that map measurements are invariant overlooks areas of geographical uncertainty (e.g., projection distortions). Acknowledge these to show deeper awareness of knowledge limitations.
The claim âno-one can challenge that a car cannot be seen on the right sideâ¦â is tautological and unclear. Revise with a concrete example from perception studies in AOKs.
Consider defining core terminology (e.g., âinterpretationâ, âsubjectiveâ) early to ensure analytical precision throughout the exhibition.
Object 2 is clearly labeled, but consider adding the poem title in the heading for immediate clarity.
Personal connection to Heaneyâs poem enriches context, demonstrating authentic engagement and fulfilling the requirement for specific real-world relevance.
Explanation of interpretability is general. Integrate discussion of metaphor and symbolism as ways of knowing, linking explicitly back to the IA prompt.
The Reddit link is an unreliable source. Replace with scholarly or published literary analysis to substantiate claims about the poemâs interpretation.
Analyzing word connotations is insightful; connect this to the language area of knowledge or semiotics to deepen your TOK exploration.
Specify how linguistic ambiguity (e.g., polysemy, connotation) contributes to interpretative flexibility, citing TOK guide concepts for precision.
Drawing distinct perspectives (relationships vs. human experience) shows appreciation of multiple interpretations and strengthens your justification.
Linking the cookie recipe to your pandemic experience personalizes the object selection and anchors it in a specific context.
The recipeâs procedural framework is described, but you need to connect procedural knowledge to the knowledge framework and discuss limits of creativity.
Provide a specific example of how you customized this recipe during trials to illustrate the degree of personal interpretation.
The recipe header is bold but could include a caption outlining its iterative development to clarify its contribution to the exhibition.
The Bake Off example concretely illustrates how shared instructions can yield divergent outcomes, effectively highlighting interpretation within procedural knowledge.
The summary restates object features but does not explicitly tie all three back to the prompt. Draw out how each object collectively addresses the IA question.
YouTube citation lacks consistency and authority. Replace with properly formatted, reliable academic sources to bolster your evidence.
Enhance the figure caption by including author, date, and publication context to situate the concept of scaffolding within its literary framework.

strands.name: Does the exhibition successfully show how TOK manifests in the world around us?
strands.content: The exhibition does not reach the standard described by the other levels or does not use one of the IA prompts provided.

strands.name: Does the exhibition successfully show how TOK manifests in the world around us?

strands.name: Does the exhibition successfully show how TOK manifests in the world around us?
strands.content: The exhibition identifies three objects, although the real-world contexts of the objects may be implied rather than explicitly stated. Basic links between the objects and the selected IA prompt are made, but the explanation of these links is unconvincing and/or unfocused. There is a superficial justification for the inclusion of each object in the exhibition. Reasons for the inclusion of the objects are offered, but these are not supported by appropriate evidence and/or lack relevance to the selected IA prompt. There may be significant repetition across the justifications of the different objects

strands.name: Does the exhibition successfully show how TOK manifests in the world around us?
strands.content: The exhibition identifies three objects, although the real-world contexts of these objects may be vaguely or imprecisely stated. There is some explanation of the links between the three objects and the selected IA prompt. There is some justification for the inclusion of each object in the exhibition. Some of the points are supported by evidence and references to the selected IA prompt.

strands.name: Does the exhibition successfully show how TOK manifests in the world around us?
strands.content: The exhibition identifies three objects and their real-world contexts. Links between each of the three objects and the selected IA prompt are explained, although this explanation may lack precision and clarity in parts. There is a justification of the contribution that each individual object makes to the exhibition. Many of the points are supported by appropriate evidence and references to the selected IA prompt.

strands.name: Does the exhibition successfully show how TOK manifests in the world around us?
strands.content: The exhibition clearly identifies three objects and their specific real-world contexts. Links between each of the three objects and the selected IA prompt are clearly made and well-explained. There is a strong justification of the particular contribution that each individual object makes to the exhibition. All, or nearly all, of the points are well-supported by appropriate evidence and explicit references to the selected IA prompt.
